source: Basic Fighter-class strike craft will deploy to engage nearby hostiles when the mothership enters battle. Will stay close to its carrier to intercept bombers and missiles.
text: Basic Fighter-class strike craft will deploy to engage nearby hostiles when the mothership enters battle. Will stay close to its carrier to intercept bombers and missiles.

source: Improved Fighters target smaller enemy vessels as well as bombers and strike craft in coordinated maneuvers. Will stay close to its carrier to intercept bombers and missiles.
text: Improved Fighters target smaller enemy vessels as well as bombers and strike craft in coordinated maneuvers. Will stay close to its carrier to intercept bombers and missiles.

source: An Advanced Fighter Wing is capable of doing significant damage to smaller enemy vessels and hold its own against hostile strike craft. Will stay close to its carrier to intercept bombers and missiles.

source: Reactor boosters augmented by Graviton Power Technology
